ddls:
CREATE TABLE "houses" (
  "house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each house */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the house */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the house in thousands of dollars */,
  "predicted_price" INTEGER /* Predicted price of the house in thousands of dollars */,
  "residual" INTEGER /* Residual value of the actual price minus the predicted price */,
  "residual2" INTEGER /* Residual value squared */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the house */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the house */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the house */,
  "square_feet" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the house */,
  "garage" INTEGER /* Whether the house has a garage (0/1) */,
  "pool" INTEGER /* Whether the house has a pool (0/1) */,
  "lot_size" INTEGER /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the house was built */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the house was last renovated */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family, apartment, townhouse) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("house_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_houses_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the house is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the house is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the house is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the area */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the area */,
  "school_rating" INTEGER /* School rating in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the market trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Numerical value indicating the impact of the trend on house prices */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend information (e.g., news article, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the value was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator data (e.g., government report, financial news) */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of economic indicator (e.g., macroeconomic, microeconomic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, investor, admin) */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the house for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_price" INTEGER /* Predicted price of the house in thousands of dollars */,
  "date_predicted" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., 0.95) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom scenario */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scenario */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the house for which the scenario is created */,
  "custom_age" INTEGER /* Custom age of the house for the scenario */,
  "custom_economic_indicator" REAL /* Custom economic indicator value for the scenario */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the scenario was created */,
  "custom_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Custom number of bedrooms for the scenario */,
  "custom_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Custom number of bathrooms for the scenario */,
  "custom_square_feet" INTEGER /* Custom total square footage for the scenario */,
  "custom_garage" INTEGER /* Custom garage status for the scenario (0/1) */,
  "custom_pool" INTEGER /* Custom pool status for the scenario (0/1) */,
  "custom_lot_size" INTEGER /* Custom lot size for the scenario */,
  "custom_year_built" INTEGER /* Custom year built for the scenario */,
  "custom_last_renovated" INTEGER /* Custom last renovated year for the scenario */,
  "custom_property_type" TEXT /* Custom property type for the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_scenarios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_scenarios_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction */,
  "actual_price" INTEGER /* Actual price of the house in thousands of dollars */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the log was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the actual price data (e.g., MLS, real estate agent) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the actual price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_logs_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "date_evaluated" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model used (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "training_data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training data used for the model */,
  "test_data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the test data used for the model */,
  "features_used" TEXT /* List of features used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed (e.g., login, prediction request) */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_protection" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the data protection regulation */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance with the regulation */,
  "date_verified" TEXT /* Date when compliance was verified */,
  "regulation_version" TEXT /* Version of the data protection regulation */,
  "verification_method" TEXT /* Method used to verify compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)
